title: Britain asks parents: Should social media be banned for under-16s?
description: LONDON, March 1 - Britain is seeking the views of parents and children on whether to ban access to social media for under-16s, as well as possible restrictions on gaming platforms and artificial intelligence chatbots. Read more at straitstimes.com.

title: SC will have to change how it teaches students in AI world
description: The rapid expansion of artificial intelligence logically raises the question of how young people need to be prepared for this environment.

title: AI is giving some NFL scouts, coaches ‘anxiety,’ insider says
description: Pro Football Talk's Mike Florio reported there is some "anxiety" about artificial intelligence and whether it will eliminate jobs.
content:
Amid the drills and interviews at the NFL Scouting Combine, a different conversation is gaining momentum: how artificial intelligence could reshape NFL organizations.

title: Exclusive: Australia says it may go after app stores, search engines in AI age crackdown
description: Australia's internet regulator said it may push search engines and app stores to block artificial intelligence services that fail to verify user ages after a Reuters review found more than half had not made public any steps to comply by a deadline next week.
content: SYDNEY, Mar 2 (Reuters) - Australia's internet regulator said it may push search engines and app stores to block artificial intelligence services that fail to verify user ages after a Reuters review found more than half had not made public any steps ... [4867 chars]
